Talk to you soon.
Thank you all.
Bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to review and refine content strategy for SchoolAI's SEO and programmatic content initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on student outcomes over AI messaging (90% content)](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Balance programmatic vs. editorial content, starting editorial-heavy](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Calibration articles needed to align tone, style, and brand](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Publishing process and image strategy to be determined](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Airtable structure presented with content clusters for programmatic and editorial topics](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [\~50 programmatic topics per category, multiple editorial categories](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Titles are placeholders; final titles will be SEO-optimized](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Content refreshes de-prioritized; focus on net new content](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### AI Messaging Approach

  - [Minimize explicit AI focus (90% on student outcomes)](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Position SchoolAI as delivering holistic solutions across entire school/district](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Differentiate with depth of thought leadership vs. competitors' "GPT wrapper" approach](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)

### Regional Content Opportunities

  - [Exploring state-specific and regional school district content](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Potential to fill gap where competitors aren't addressing regional topics](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### Content Approval Process

  - [Colton to create shared Slack channel for internal team review](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [FWD team to propose batches of articles for approval](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)

### Publishing and Images

  - [FWD team typically handles publishing; auto-publishing from Airtable in development](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Image strategy needed: stock photos vs. AI-generated vs. custom brand-aligned approach](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Authorship strategy to be determined by SchoolAI](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)

### Programmatic vs. Editorial Balance

  - [Initial focus on editorial content for faster implementation](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
  - [Programmatic content may require new page templates](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Consider testing programmatic concepts as blog posts before full implementation](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Colton to provide brand guidelines, logins, and any existing instructional materials](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [FWD team to propose initial calibration articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Kyle to send examples of successful programmatic content pages](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
  - [Colton to integrate programmatic page template considerations into ongoing website redesign](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)
  - [FWD team to send meeting recap and action items](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
  - [SchoolAI team to review Airtable content strategy and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/tKByZyXeVxgktegrq7sT1abSwx6dPdHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)

action_items.description: Review content categories in Airtable. Choose calibration articles to start with
Send Colton examples of best programmatic work (public pages)
Send meeting recap w/ action items to Colton via Slack
